title: Wildlife Expanded: Snakes
description: This mod adds snakes to the game with random patterns and colors.
body:
### This mod adds different types of snakes to the game!


#### About the snakes:
- 20% chance for the snake to be poisonous
- they come in different sizes, colors (eye, body, head, tail, stomach, patterns)
- they have some variations in patterns, making them more unique
- childs inherit their parents color and pattern

- can be healed with fish after its tamed (restores 1/3 of its max health)
- can be bred with raw chicken or rabbit

- tameable with tropical fish

- they will attack every living mobs except monsters,
but when they are tamed then it will only attack the target or the attacker of the owner

- does follow the owner but wont teleport when its too far away

- immune to poison
